item.topic: The Wi-Fi® indicator isn't glowing amber. What do I do now?
item.answer:
If the Wi-Fi® indicator is not glowing solid amber, your system is not in setup mode.

  1. Power on your system.

  2. Press and hold the Control button on the back of the SoundTouch® wireless adapter for 1-8 seconds.

    Note: If the Wi-Fi® indicator does not glow solid amber, press and hold the Control button again, making sure to release the button before 8 seconds elapses.
The Control button is on the SoundTouch® wireless adapter's connector panel.
The Wi-Fi® indicator is on the SoundTouch® wireless adapter's connector panel.
